rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for implementation-level signal routing must be placed in the implementation scope after relevant subcomponents and connections
Assumptions and guarantees referencing component ports must be scoped to valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
generic_rules: Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation contracts
Guarantee statements in implementation scope should relate visible outputs to visible inputs, avoiding implementation-only subcomponent paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for deterministic dependency guarantees
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants in scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
